Name: sapdme_nonconformancecode
Title: Nonconformance Code
ChangeLog: [{"date":"16 Nov 2025","notes":"The nonconformance code API is extended by adding severity to the create, retrieve, and update responses and to the create and update requests.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"23 Nov 2024","notes":"The nonconformance code API is extended by adding dataType, canBePrimary, autoCloseIncident, dispositionRoutings, and secondaryCodes to the create, retrieve, and update responses and to the create and update requests.","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"24 Aug 2024","notes":"Add API to retrieve, create, update, and delete custom field definitions","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"12 Nov 2022","notes":"Minor documentation corrections/ updates","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"20 Aug 2022","notes":"Corrected URL for Developer Guide/ Prepare for API Integration","state":"Active","version":"v1"},{"date":"13 Nov 2021","notes":"This API can be used to create, change, delete, and search for nonconformance codes.","state":"Active","version":"v1"}]
